description: Source URLs and official HDFC AMC fund documents (SID, KIM, Factsheet) for each target fund. The source_url is the IndMoney page from which data is scraped — this URL must be included in every chunk as the citation source.

sid.label: Scheme Information Document (SID)
sid.description: Complete scheme details including investment objective, risk factors, fees, and legal information.

kim.label: Key Information Memorandum (KIM)
kim.description: Summarized key information for investors including minimum investment, load structure, and benchmark.

factsheet.label: Monthly Factsheet
factsheet.description: Monthly performance summary, portfolio composition, and fund manager commentary.
